summary: Iteration 30: Verified Branches CRUD, view-mode toggle (Stok/Konsinye), multi-share, RevenueComparisonCard, PaymentRemindersBar, BranchesManager. Backend 13/14 pass (1 logical gap: cars endpoint silently ignores branch_id, so the 'active vehicle blocks delete' guard never triggers in practice). Frontend flows all working as expected.

minor.issue: Pydantic CarCreate model does not accept/persist branch_id. As a result, the DELETE /api/branches/{id} guard that blocks deletion when cars.branch_id == branch.id never matches – branches can always be deleted regardless of cars. branches.py guard is correct, but cars.py needs to accept and store branch_id (and ideally allow PUT to reassign).
Two 404s on every Dashboard load – 'Bildirimler yüklenemedi'. Pre-existing regression also visible in iter 29.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/branches with name+is_main returns id
Backend: PUT /api/branches updates fields and persists
Backend: PUT is_main:true makes that branch unique main
Frontend: Login page loads, no register link
Frontend: Login → Dashboard, no JSX errors
Frontend: PaymentRemindersBar hidden when no installments (expected)
Frontend: view-mode-toggle/grid/list buttons render on Stok
Frontend: toggle-multi-select-btn opens multi-share Paylaş button
Frontend: Konsinye page also has view-mode-toggle
Frontend: Settings → branches-manager + add-branch-btn render; existing branches with ANA badge on main
failed_tests: Backend: test_delete_branch_with_active_car_blocked – DELETE returned 200 instead of 400 (root cause: cars.py drops branch_id field).
action_items: Add branch_id: Optional[str] = None to CarCreate (and update model) in /app/backend/routes/cars.py and persist it; this enables the branch-active-car guard.
Optional: add data-testid='vehicle-list-container' to outer Liste view in InventoryPage for automation.
critical_code_review_comments: branches.py – clean org-scoped CRUD, soft-delete, is_main uniqueness on POST+PUT.
cars.py missing branch_id integration → multi-galeri filtering / delete-guard non-functional end-to-end.
RevenueComparisonCard renders 3 columns + comparison percentages cleanly.
BranchesManager has comprehensive data-testid coverage – good for testing.

test_credentials.note: Use button[type='submit'] for login click (text 'GİRİŞ YAP' has Turkish dotted İ which can cause case-sensitive issues).

seed_data_creation: Branches created via API: Merkez Şube, ŞubeA, ŞubeB, Yeni Ad, X1, X2. One car BMW 320i sent with branch_id but server dropped the field.
context_for_next_testing_agent: If main agent fixes cars.py branch_id integration, re-run /app/backend/tests/test_branches_iter30.py – test_delete_branch_with_active_car_blocked should turn green. Frontend flows fully verified.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: DELETE /api/branches/{id} succeeded for a branch with an assigned car (expected 400).
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: POST /api/cars silently discards branch_id because CarCreate Pydantic model doesn't declare it.
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: 1) POST /api/branches {name:'X'} → bid. 2) POST /api/cars {..., branch_id: bid}. 3) DELETE /api/branches/{bid} → 200.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Add branch_id: Optional[str] = None to CarCreate/CarUpdate and merge into doc; optionally validate the branch exists and is not deleted in same org.
